response:
## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Multi-Step Checkout Form With Broken Error Association **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Environmental Contrast, Keyboard & Motor, Screen Reader Semantic, Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification & Reflow, Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 0 | | MAJOR | 4 | | MINOR | 2 | | ENHANCEMENT | 1 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None of the escalated perspectives passed all criteria. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role #### Front-End Dev - **Error messages not associated with form fields** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 3.3.1 - **Error summary missing live region role** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 - **Contrast ratio below 4.5:1 for error text** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.3 - **No autocomplete attributes on form fields** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MINOR — 1.3.5 #### UX Design - **Error messages lack corrective suggestions** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.3 - **No way to return to previous steps** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MINOR — 3.2.3 #### Content Author - **Error summary not linked to specific fields** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 3.3.1 - **Error messages only state "required" without guidance** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.3 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None — all findings are code-level and confirmed from source. --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Error messages are not programmatically associated with their form fields using aria-describedby **WCAG:** 3.3.1 Error Suggestion **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** Error spans use sibling DOM placement but no aria-describedby on inputs **Fix:** Add `aria-describedby={errorId}` to inputs and generate unique IDs for error messages **Finding:** Error summary lacks aria-live or role="alert" for screen reader announcement **WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev **Evidence:** `
` has no role or aria-live attributes **Fix:** Add `role="alert"` or `aria-live="polite"` to error summary container **Finding:** Error text color (#b71c1c) has only ~3.1:1 contrast against #fff3f3 background **WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast Minimum **Perspective:** Environmental Contrast **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** CSS `.error-text` and `.error-summary` color combinations **Fix:** Increase contrast to 4.5:1 (e.g., use #000000 on #fff3f3) **Finding:** No autocomplete attributes on form fields (name, address, card) **WCAG:** 1.3.5 Meaningful Sequence **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** Inputs missing `autocomplete="given-name"`, `autocomplete="address-line1"`, etc. **Fix:** Add appropriate `autocomplete` attributes to all form fields **Finding:** Error messages only state "required" without corrective suggestions **WCAG:** 3.3.3 Error Suggestion **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Error messages like "First name is required" **Fix:** Add actionable guidance: "Please enter your first name to continue" **Finding:** No way to return to previous steps in multi-step form **WCAG:** 3.2.3 Consistent Navigation **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design **Evidence:** Back navigation only available through browser history **Fix:** Add "Back" button to all steps except first **Finding:** Step indicator states (complete/active/upcoming) not announced to screen readers **WCAG:** 2.4.6 Headings and Labels **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** ENHANCEMENT **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** `aria-label="Checkout steps"` but no aria-current or aria-describedby **Fix:** Add `aria-current="step"` to active item and describe state changes ``` --- ## Key Issues by Perspective ### Environmental Contrast (MEDIUM) - **Critical failure:** Error text contrast ratio is only ~3.1:1 (needs 4.5:1 for normal text) - **Minor issue:** Input error borders may not be visible in high contrast mode (need to test with `forced-colors` media query) ### Keyboard & Motor (MEDIUM) - **Passing criteria:** Tab order follows DOM, focus indicators visible, all interactive elements keyboard-operable - **No critical failures found** in keyboard accessibility ### Screen Reader Semantic (HIGH) - **Critical failure:** Error messages not programmatically associated with fields - **Critical failure:** Error summary lacks live region for screen reader announcement - **Minor failure:** Step indicator states not announced ### Cognitive & Neurodivergent (MEDIUM) - **Critical failure:** Error messages lack corrective suggestions - **Minor failure:** No autocomplete attributes on form fields - **Minor failure:** No back navigation in multi-step form --- ## Recommended Fixes 1. **Error association fix** (Front-End Dev): ```jsx // Add unique ID to each error message const errorId = `error-${field}`; ... {errors[field]} ``` 2. **Error summary live region** (Front-End Dev): ```jsx
...
``` 3. **Contrast fix** (Visual Design + Front-End Dev): ```css .error-text { color: #000000; /* 18:1 contrast against #fff3f3 */ } ``` 4. **Autocomplete attributes** (Front-End Dev): ```jsx ``` 5. **Error message enhancement** (Content Author): ```js // Instead of "First name is required" "Please enter your first name to continue" ``` 6. **Back navigation** (UX Design + Front-End Dev): ```jsx {currentStep > 0 && ( )} ```
